entities.name: NYANDO
entities.description: A region in Kenya where smallholder farming systems were studied for climate change adaptation

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The primary crop studied for production and yield projections

entities.name: DECISION SUPPORT SYSTEM FOR AGROTECHNOLOGY TRANSFER
entities.description: A modeling tool used to project maize yields under different climate scenarios

entities.name: RAIN FED CONDITIONS
entities.description: The specific agricultural condition under which the maize production was modeled

entities.name: KATUMANI COMP B
entities.description: An early maturing variety of maize

entities.name: HYBRID 511
entities.description: A medium maturing variety of maize

entities.name: HYBRID 614
entities.description: A late maturing variety of maize

entities.name: HADLEY CENTRE GLOBAL ENVIRONMENT MODEL VERSION 2
entities.description: A global coupled model used to downscale climate data for the study area

entities.name: REPRESENTATIVE CONCENTRATION PATHWAYS
entities.description: Climate scenarios, specifically RCP 4.5 and 8.5, used to project future climate data

entities.name: KISUMU METEOROLOGICAL STATION
entities.description: The source of historical and current climate data for the Nyando region

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural output of maize measured in kg ha-1

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The phenomenon of long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting farming systems

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: An environmental factor projected to increase, affecting crop yields

entities.name: RAINFALL DURATION
entities.description: An environmental factor projected to reduce, affecting crop yields
